case_title: STARLENE YANCEY VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $944.00 FILED BY YANCEY, STARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA BRITTON COURT APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANCEY, STARLENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-20-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BRITTON COURT APARTMENTS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-18-2008 AT 3:30PM. NO SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANCEY, STARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA $858.81 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $858.81, DEFENDANT BRITTON COURT APARTMENTS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO SERVICE. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
